etimes"The prices shocked me.." Foreign traveller Faria appreciates Indian pharmacy prices, says, "I’m moving here!"A foreign traveler's viral post highlights India's remarkably affordable medicines, with a cough syrup and lozenges costing just ₹252. This affordability, driven by a strong generic drug industry and government price caps, makes healthcare accessible. Many travelers now stock up on essential medications during their visits, finding prices significantly lower than abroad.

etimesMeet Luisa Laemmel: The stunning model dating Orlando Bloom after his breakup with Katy PerryOrlando Bloom is reportedly dating Swiss model Luisa Laemmel, 28, following his split from Katy Perry. The couple has been seen together at high-profile events and on a romantic getaway in Switzerland. Bloom, 49, and Laemmel's 21-year age difference has sparked online discussion.

etimesWhy do some dead bodies move on their own? Study reveals chilling science behind itA recent study reveals that human bodies can shift positions naturally during decomposition, even without external interference. Researchers observed significant arm movements in a donated body over 17 months, attributing these changes to drying tissues and relaxing ligaments. This discovery is crucial for forensics, helping to distinguish natural decay shifts from signs of struggle and improve time-of-death estimations.
